Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Chris Lalancette

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package builtin_interfaces

1.2.3 (2026-05-13)

1.2.2 (2025-07-16)

  • Add info to duration message and time message comments (backport #176) (#179)
  • Contributors: mergify[bot]

1.2.1 (2022-11-07)

1.2.0 (2022-03-01)

  • Update maintainers to Chris Lalancette (#130)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash

1.1.0 (2021-08-06)

1.0.3 (2021-04-06)

  • Change index.ros.org -> docs.ros.org. (#122)
  • Updating Quality Declaration (#120)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, shonigmann

1.0.2 (2021-02-22)

  • Update quality declaration to QL 1. (#116)
  • Update package maintainers. (#112)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

0.7.4 (2019-05-29)

0.7.3 (2019-05-20)

0.7.2 (2019-05-08)

0.7.1 (2019-04-26)

0.7.0 (2019-04-14)

  • Description says package is for DDS types (#59)
  • Contributors: Shane Loretz

0.6.2 (2019-01-11)

0.6.1 (2018-12-06)

0.6.0 (2018-11-16)

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)
  • Merge pull request #26 from ros2/move_builtin_to_rcl_interfaces
  • add builtin_interfaces into its own folder
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Geoffrey Biggs

Authors

  • Chris Lalancette
  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Version 1.0.3
License Apache License 2.0
Build type AMENT_CMAKE
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

VCS Type git
VCS Version galactic
Last Updated 2021-04-06
Dev Status MAINTAINED
Released RELEASED
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Chris Lalancette
  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package builtin_interfaces

1.0.3 (2021-04-06)

  • Change index.ros.org -> docs.ros.org. (#122)
  • Updating Quality Declaration (#120)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, shonigmann

1.0.2 (2021-02-22)

  • Update quality declaration to QL 1. (#116)
  • Update package maintainers. (#112)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

0.7.4 (2019-05-29)

0.7.3 (2019-05-20)

0.7.2 (2019-05-08)

0.7.1 (2019-04-26)

0.7.0 (2019-04-14)

  • Description says package is for DDS types (#59)
  • Contributors: Shane Loretz

0.6.2 (2019-01-11)

0.6.1 (2018-12-06)

0.6.0 (2018-11-16)

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)
  • Merge pull request #26 from ros2/move_builtin_to_rcl_interfaces
  • add builtin_interfaces into its own folder
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

rosidl_default_generators

ament_lint_common

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Geoffrey Biggs

Authors

  • Chris Lalancette
  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package builtin_interfaces

1.6.0 (2023-04-18)

1.5.0 (2023-04-11)

1.4.0 (2023-02-13)

  • Update common_interfaces to C++17. (#215) (#151)
  • [rolling] Update maintainers - 2022-11-07 (#150)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash, Chris Lalancette

1.3.1 (2022-09-09)

  • Depend on rosidl_core_generators for packages required by actions (#144)
  • Fix documented range (#139)
  • Contributors: Jacob Perron, Tully Foote

1.3.0 (2022-04-29)

1.2.0 (2022-03-01)

  • Update maintainers to Chris Lalancette (#130)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash

1.1.0 (2021-08-06)

1.0.3 (2021-04-06)

  • Change index.ros.org -> docs.ros.org. (#122)
  • Updating Quality Declaration (#120)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, shonigmann

1.0.2 (2021-02-22)

  • Update quality declaration to QL 1. (#116)
  • Update package maintainers. (#112)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

0.7.4 (2019-05-29)

0.7.3 (2019-05-20)

0.7.2 (2019-05-08)

0.7.1 (2019-04-26)

0.7.0 (2019-04-14)

  • Description says package is for DDS types (#59)
  • Contributors: Shane Loretz

0.6.2 (2019-01-11)

0.6.1 (2018-12-06)

0.6.0 (2018-11-16)

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Chris Lalancette

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package builtin_interfaces

1.2.3 (2026-05-13)

1.2.2 (2025-07-16)

  • Add info to duration message and time message comments (backport #176) (#179)
  • Contributors: mergify[bot]

1.2.1 (2022-11-07)

1.2.0 (2022-03-01)

  • Update maintainers to Chris Lalancette (#130)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash

1.1.0 (2021-08-06)

1.0.3 (2021-04-06)

  • Change index.ros.org -> docs.ros.org. (#122)
  • Updating Quality Declaration (#120)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, shonigmann

1.0.2 (2021-02-22)

  • Update quality declaration to QL 1. (#116)
  • Update package maintainers. (#112)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

0.7.4 (2019-05-29)

0.7.3 (2019-05-20)

0.7.2 (2019-05-08)

0.7.1 (2019-04-26)

0.7.0 (2019-04-14)

  • Description says package is for DDS types (#59)
  • Contributors: Shane Loretz

0.6.2 (2019-01-11)

0.6.1 (2018-12-06)

0.6.0 (2018-11-16)

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)
  • Merge pull request #26 from ros2/move_builtin_to_rcl_interfaces
  • add builtin_interfaces into its own folder
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

Contributing Help Wanted (-)

Package Description

A package containing message and service definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

Maintainers

  • Chris Lalancette

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package builtin_interfaces

1.2.3 (2026-05-13)

1.2.2 (2025-07-16)

  • Add info to duration message and time message comments (backport #176) (#179)
  • Contributors: mergify[bot]

1.2.1 (2022-11-07)

1.2.0 (2022-03-01)

  • Update maintainers to Chris Lalancette (#130)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash

1.1.0 (2021-08-06)

1.0.3 (2021-04-06)

  • Change index.ros.org -> docs.ros.org. (#122)
  • Updating Quality Declaration (#120)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, shonigmann

1.0.2 (2021-02-22)

  • Update quality declaration to QL 1. (#116)
  • Update package maintainers. (#112)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner

1.0.1 (2020-06-29)

  • Increase Quality level of packages to 3 (#108)
  • Document that Time and Duration are explictly ROS Time (#103)
  • Add Security Vulnerability Policy pointing to REP-2006. (#106)
  • Updating QD to reflect package versions (#107)
  • Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Tully Foote, brawner

1.0.0 (2020-05-26)

  • Add quality declarations for each package except test_msgs (#92)
  • Contributors: brawner

0.9.0 (2020-04-25)

0.8.0 (2019-09-26)

0.7.4 (2019-05-29)

0.7.3 (2019-05-20)

0.7.2 (2019-05-08)

0.7.1 (2019-04-26)

0.7.0 (2019-04-14)

  • Description says package is for DDS types (#59)
  • Contributors: Shane Loretz

0.6.2 (2019-01-11)

0.6.1 (2018-12-06)

0.6.0 (2018-11-16)

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)
  • Merge pull request #26 from ros2/move_builtin_to_rcl_interfaces
  • add builtin_interfaces into its own folder
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

ament_lint_common

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

builtin_interfaces/README.md

builtin_interfaces

A package containing message definitions for types defined in the OMG IDL Platform Specific Model.

For more information about ROS 2 time, see design.ros2.org.

For more information about ROS 2 interfaces, see docs.ros.org.

Messages (.msg)

  • Duration: Describes a time duration composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.
  • Time: Describes a point in time, composed of seconds and nanoseconds components.

Quality Declaration

This package claims to be in the Quality Level 1 category, see the Quality Declaration for more details.

  • use add_compile_options instead of setting only cxx flags
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

0.5.0 (2018-06-24)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • member of rosidl_interfaces_packages group (#28)
  • Merge pull request #26 from ros2/move_builtin_to_rcl_interfaces
  • add builtin_interfaces into its own folder
  • Contributors: Mikael Arguedas

rosidl_default_generators
rosidl_default_runtime
ament_lint_common
